memoryArtifacts.headline: Descendants of Guillame Pecche, Second Generation
Memorial
memoryArtifacts.description: Hamon Pecche was the eldest son and heir of the second marriage and is stated to have been one of the favorites of King Henry I. A charter of King Henry I confirms the gift of Cheveley to Ralph Pecche …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hamon de Pêche於大約1100年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可格亞特 瑟洛福時，他的父親William Pecche34歲，母親Isilia Bourges30歲。他於1126年與Alice Peverel在英國素福爾可維其哈布盧可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1178年9月29日之後在英國英格蘭越可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hamon de Pêche于大约1100年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可格亞特 瑟洛福时，他的父亲William Pecche34岁，母亲Isilia Bourges30岁。他于1126年与Alice Peverel在英国素福爾可維其哈布盧可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1178年9月29日之后在英国英格兰越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pêche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a variant of   Pech   ‘pitch, tar’.
Americanized form of Slovenian Peče or of its Germanized form Petsche , which is also a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname.

variants.name: Pech
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Manuel, Alvaro, Diego, Edelmira, Emilio, Francisco, Gilberto, Jorge, Jose Angel.  German Gerhard, Hans, Ilse, Lutz, Manfred, Wolf.

Czech and Slovak; Sorbian (Pěch and P'ech): from a pet form of the personal name Petr (Czech), Pětš (Lower Sorbian), and Peter (Slovak). This is also a Germanized form of the Upper Sorbian cognate Pjech.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German pech (German Pech) ‘pitch, tar’, presumably a nickname for someone with exceptionally dark skin or hair, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who prepared, sold, or used pitch. This may in part also be the origin of a homonymic Polish, Czech, and Slovak surname (compare above and below).

nameMeanings.name: Hamon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Hamon de Pêche was born about 1100, in Great Thurlow, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Pecche, was 34 and his mother, Isilia Bourges, was 30. He married Alice Peverel in 1126, in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 29 September 1178, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hamon de Pêche est né environ 1100, à Great Thurlow, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Pecche, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Isilia Bourges, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Alice Peverel en 1126, à Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 29 septembre 1178, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Great Thurlow, Suffolk, England: Great Thurlow, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Hamon de Pêche um 1100 in Great Thurlow, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Pecche 34 und seine Mutter Isilia Bourges 30. Er hat 1126 in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England Alice Peverel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 29. September 1178 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Hamon de Pêcheが約1100年にイギリスイギリススフォルクグレアト スウルロウで生まれた時，父William Peccheは34歳，母Isilia Bourgesは30歳であった。1126年にイギリススフォルクウィックハンブルークでAlice Peverelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1178年9月29日以後にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hamon de Pêche(이)가 대략 1100년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 그리트 스를로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Pecche(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Isilia Bourges(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1126년 영국 수폴크 윅함브룩에서 Alice Peverel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1178년 9월 29일 이후 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hamon de Pêche nasceu aproximadamente 1100, em Great Thurlow, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Pecche, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Isilia Bourges, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Peverel em 1126, em Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 29 de setembro de 1178, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hamon de Pêche родился около 1100 г. в местности грит турлоу, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Pecche было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Isilia Bourges, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Peverel в 1126 г. в местности виккхамбрук, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер после 29 сентябрь 1178 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Alice Peverel en 1126, en Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija.
